basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Research Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates as per notification age criteria who have B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Chemical Engineering or B.Sc in Chemistry (First Class) with relevant knowledge in Extractive Metallurgy and Electrochemistry are eligible to apply for these Research Staff vacancies. The application process for NIT Raipur Research Staff Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 13 May 2026.

qualification.details: B.E. / B.Tech. (Metallurgical and Materials Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Chemistry (B.Sc) / Chemical Engineering OR Equivalent with first class from recognized Institute / University. Final year students waiting for results with good academic background can also apply. Proficiency in Fundamentals of Extractive Metallurgy, Electrochemistry. Research relevant to the project domain, and research publications support in Process Metallurgy preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Research Staff Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur Research Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the NIT Raipur Research Staff position is 13th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Staff post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E. / B.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Chemistry (B.Sc) / Chemical Engineering or equivalent with first class. Final year students with good academic records can also apply.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Staff position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NIT Raipur Research Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Staff in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q9. What are the preferred skills for this Research Staff position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Fundamentals of Extractive Metallurgy and Electrochemistry is preferred. Research experience relevant to the project domain and publications in Process Metallurgy are also advantageous.

faq.question: Q10. Can final year students apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, final year students who are waiting for their results but have a good academic background are eligible to apply for this Research Staff position.
